action.reasoning: Observation: best score remains raw SpeechBrain MetricGAN+ PESQ 3.134; prior postfilter was disabled because validation showed it harmed PESQ. The installed SpeechBrain enhance_batch path is now known: compute_features -> enhance_model mask -> resynth. Analysis: the most plausible remaining improvement is conservative supervised fine-tuning of the pretrained MetricGAN+ enhancement model on paired VoiceBank data, while preserving a safe validation-based fallback to raw MetricGAN+. Decision: overwrite the helper/predict scripts with robust checkpoint support for an optional fine-tuned MetricGAN state, add a fine-tuning script that trains one epoch with waveform+spectral losses, auto-enables only if validation PESQ improves, then submit the auto checkpoint.
